{{CargoOrgan
|name=Starlight Aegis
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10700
|idx=58
|description=Channeling the power of celestial bodies through starstones, this sample grants dazzling, peerless protection — and the courage to face anything.
|skill=When hit by the enemy, trigger the protection of the stars, dealing DMG equal to 120% of ATK!
|hp=3770
|def=244
|atk=230
|rush=219
|gene1=When HP is below 30%, HP Regen +24%
|gene2=Restore 800 HP each round
|gene3=Lifesteal Effect +20%
|gene4=Wind DMG +120
|gene5=Each round, {race} DEF +80
|gene6=Dodge +8%
|gene7=Healing +12% (Awakened)
|}}
